# [NBFC] DSP Finance Website (Aug25)

: Gautam Mahesh
Created time: July 30, 2025 4:08 PM
Status: In progress
Last edited: January 7, 2026 6:34 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

DSP Fin website currently meets the basic expectations in terms of content and regulatory requirements. That said, it still doesn’t measure upto competitor websites like BFL, TCL or NBFC websites like Navi, CRED, Piramal, etc. 

Now that we need to do a PR and work with external partners (Banks, rating agencies, etc), we need to polish up the website to ensure it conveys trust and confidence.

The new version would also have a basic customer servicing activities like ability to request for a SOA, disbursement or even do repayment.

---

# **How do we measure success?**

- Increased confidence among customers in DSP Finance Brand
- Increased confidence among LSPs/partners in DSP Finance Brand
- Increased confidence among banks/agencies in DSP Finance Brand
- Increased confidence among regulator in DSP Finance Brand
- Number of customers who are able to do the application journey on DSP website
- Number of customers who are able to do the servicing journey on DSP website

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

Most lenders, even those who work with partners like DMI, Credit Saison, InCred, Piramal Finance have a fully functional website that covers the below areas.

- Overview
- Products/Offerings
- Company (Leadership, etc)
- Login (Customer, Partner, etc)
- Policies & Disclosures
- FAQs (Customer facing)

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Summary

[DSP Finance Website: Summary](%5BNBFC%5D%20DSP%20Finance%20Website%20(Aug25)/DSP%20Finance%20Website%20Summary%20264e8d3af13a805bb518daaa62cb9e23.md)

## Positioning

We, at DSP Finance, want to be positioned as the ***Most innovative and cutting-edge lender with deep expertise in capital markets.***

- We want to stand out from the crowd as a new-age and customer-friendly lender
- We want to stand out from traditional lenders (BFL, TCL)
- We want to standout as a specialist lender in the capital markets

From a customer perspective, we want DSP Finance to stand for.

- Safe
    - Reliable and dependable
    - Transparent pricing
    - Complete control of facility & collateral
- Simple:
    - Easy to understand offerings
    - Simple to use (disbursement, repayment, etc)
    - Easy to reach customer support
- New-age:
    - Industry-leading products
    - Fully digital experience
    - Quick disbursements & instant repayments

From a partner perspective, we want DSP Finance to stand for.

- New-age:
    - Industry-leading products
    - Innovative product offerings
    - Ability to deliver delightful experience
- Best-in-class platform:
    - Strong technology
    - Robust operations
    - Multiple suite of products
- Seamless experience
    - Fully digital experience
    - Ease to integrate with simple API documentation
    - Quick go-live & ramp-up

## Branding

DSP Finance can take one of the below approaches to branding.

- **Distinct**: maintain a distinct & standalone brand compared to DSP AMC. Mild emphasis is placed on DSP brand and major emphasis is on the Finance brand. Example. LazyPay by PayU, etc.
- **Coupled**: maintain an identity that aligns strongly to DSP AMC and group. Strong emphasis is placed on DSP brand and minor emphasis is on the Finance brand. Example, Tata Capital, etc.

Below are the pillars of the approach.

|  | **Distinct (House of Brands)** | **Coupled (Umbrella Brand)** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Customer Awareness | Lower trust since DSP Finance will be a newer brand | [Pro] Higher trust due to strong connect with DSP AMC |
| Partner Awareness | Would require increased branding due to being a new entity | [Pro] Higher trust due to strong connect with DSP AMC, especially in assisted channels and older customers |
| Business potential (Cross-Sell) | No impact as the DSP branding is still retained |  |
| Product Extensions & Branding | [Pro]Helps brand sub-products under the DSP Fin brand | Sub-product branding can be tougher to execute due to  |
| Brand strength potential | [Pro]Can be developed into a strong & independent brand with effort | Finance (Lending) will always be an ancillary brand, shadowed by DSP AMC |
| Regulatory trust | Lower trust since DSP Finance will be a newer brand but will improve a period of time | [Pro]Higher trust due to strong connect with DSP AMC |
| Distinct positioning | [Pro] Easier to position distinctly with its own tenets | Trickier to position; needs to align with AMC brand values and positioning |

**Summary**: In a nutshell, a distinct brand would help DSP Finance build trust through the DSP group branding, yet maintaining an independent identity in the ecosystem.

# **Appendix**

## Meeting notes

### Meeting with Jayesh Sir

**Date**: 22nd July, Tuesday

**Attendees**: Jayesh Sir, Gautam

- All regulatory items (disclosures, policies, etc)
- Additional information we need to give
- Talk to Sahib on the regulatory items
- Talk about DSP AMC and marketing stuff
- Layout and feel → Gautam
- Need to make it look good (CP buyers, Rating agencies)
- Timeline: we need to time-box it. ETA: August 1st week
- Jayesh sir wants to review the content
- Structured lending: add 1-2 paragraph. Bespoke financing solutions
- Retail lending: finalize the content

### Meeting with Sahib & Amrita

**Date**: 5th August, Tuesday

**Attendees**: Sahib, Amrita, Gautam

- Branding at Volt + DSP level to be thought through
- Refer to DMI website
- Disclosure section
- Make grievance redressal discovery harder
- DSP Fin logo to be changed
- About Us → Management team and board of directors with details. Talk about vision and mission
- Approved list of mutual funds to be put up? → Newtap, Mirae
- Add partners → NSDL, CAMS, KFin, CDSL, etc. and lenders → ICICI
- Partners → sourcing partners (LSP) and strategic partners (NSDL, CAMS, KFin)
- Sahib to share the checklist of regulatory items for NBFC and LSP itself
- Vernacular language for Fair practices code to be added
- Contact us to be made a bit friction-induced
- Media page for releases

### Meeting with Jayesh Sir

**Date**: 25th August, Monday

- Get list from Sahib on must-have requirements for website
- Color scheme can be different if it helps us
- Think of innovative positioning -> something like DSP Advantage.
- No need to be linked tightly to DSP AMC from a identity, branding or design perspective
- Position : leadership + tech advantage
- Approach to identity. Pros and cons of standard and separate branding
